title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: CHEHALEM PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers camps for crafts, sports, games, special visitors, fieldtrips and theme-focused special events. Participants to provide a lunch and water bottle. Snacks are offered twice daily. 1802 Haworth Avenue Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 3-11 (Children entering sixth grade are not eligible) Hours: Late June-August: Monday-Friday 6:30am-6pm (closed July 4th) Email (503) 537-2909 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 537-2909 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information; registration must be completed 10 days in advance of attending FEES: Summer Registration Fee: $35 per child covers the entire summer season. This fee is not refundable. Full-time Rate Plan: 4 to 5 days per week $195 per week for Newberg and Dundee residents $215 per week for residents living outside the Newberg/Dundee area Part-time Rate Plan: 2 to 3 days per week $150 per week for Newberg and Dundee residents $170 per week for residents living outside the Newberg/Dundee area Daily Rate Plan: $60 per day, per child Multiple Child Discount: 20% discount for each additional sibling DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Dundee and Newberg SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 5:30am-10pm, Friday 5:30am-8:30pm, Saturday 8am-8:30pm, Sunday 12pm-5pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION DISTRICT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHEHALEM PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT
